message.content:
@startuml skinparam sequenceDiagram participant "WebApp" as WebApp participant "SWData" as SWData participant "Manager" as Manager participant "MessageQueue" as MessageQueue participant "Worker" as Worker participant "Memcache" as Memcache note over Manager, MessageQueue, Worker, Memcache This is just an example.
We could got wi go with Celery, but sometimes it's good to hide the concrete engine behind the abstraction layer. end note WebApp->>SWData: fetch new collection SWData->>Manager: schedule a job Manager->>MessageQueue: execute a job Manager->>Worker: update job status Worker->>Memcache: job result Manager->>SWData: update job status SWData->>Manager: job result Manager->>Memcache: job result WebApp->>SWData: get job status SWData->>Manager: get job status Manager->>Memcache: get job status @enduml
